scriptsInfo.check:node: Fails early if the active Node version is older than 22.
scriptsInfo.predev: Runs automatically before npm run dev; checks Node version.
scriptsInfo.prebuild: Runs automatically before npm run build; checks Node version.
scriptsInfo.prepreview:host: Runs automatically before npm run preview:host; checks Node version.
scriptsInfo.dev: Starts the Vite development server with live reload, reachable from other devices on the network.
scriptsInfo.build: Builds the production web app into dist/.
scriptsInfo.preview:host: Builds the production app, then serves it on the local network for browser/iPhone/PWA testing.
scriptsInfo.android:sync: Builds production web assets and syncs them into the Capacitor Android project.
scriptsInfo.android:install: Builds production web assets, syncs Capacitor Android, then installs an inspectable debug app on a connected Android device.
scriptsInfo.android:build:debug: Builds a local debug APK without installing it.
scriptsInfo.android:build:release: Builds local signed release APK/AAB if local Android signing is configured. GitHub Actions remains the canonical release builder.
scriptsInfo.sync:version:bump-code: Updates native app version metadata and bumps Android versionCode.
scriptsInfo.release:version:patch: Bumps package patch version and Android versionCode without creating a git tag.
scriptsInfo.test: Runs the Node test files such as *.test.js.

scripts.check:node:
node -e "const major = Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if (major < 22) { console.error('
Node 22+ is required for sporely-web. Current: ' + process.version + '
Use nvm install 22 && nvm use 22
'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.release:version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run sync:version:bump-code
scripts.release:version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run sync:version:bump-code
scripts.release:version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run sync:version:bump-code
